title: meniscium standleyi
intro: Meniscium standleyi, also known as the Standley's meniscium, is a type of fern species native to Mexico and Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Meniscium standleyi are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support immune function. In traditional herbal medicine, Meniscium standleyi is prepared by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, and it is also used in topical applications, such as salves and creams, for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects.
